channel.title: Health - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.description:
1. These Simple Plant Foods Are Linked to Lower Blood Pressure  SciTechDaily
  2. A simple dietary change could lower your blood pressure risk by 30%, study suggests  BBC Science Focus Magazine
  3. High blood pressure can be slashed by 30% with just 100g of cupboard staple – and palm-sized rule  The Sun
  4. Study Finds Soy, Lentils And Beans Linked To Lower Blood Pressure Risk  Dailyhunt
  5. Daily Legume and Soy Intake Tied to Measurably Lower Hypertension Risk, Meta-Analysis Finds  vegconomist - the vegan business magazine

item.title: Your Eyes Could Reveal Your Risk of Osteoporosis, Study Finds - ScienceAlert
item.description:
1. Your Eyes Could Reveal Your Risk of Osteoporosis, Study Finds  ScienceAlert
  2. A Retina’s Biological Age Can Predict Osteoporosis Risk  Inside Precision Medicine
  3. Your retina's biological age might indicate osteoporosis risk (IMAGE)  EurekAlert!
  4. AI Retinal Scans May Help Predict Osteoporosis Risk Before Fractures Occur  Discover Magazine
